column1: SwCType: AtomicSwComponentType  |  Safety: ASIL-B  |  Cycles: Init (once) | 1 ms (TimingEvent) | ModeSwitchEvent  |  Purpose: Outer PI speed control loop — computes Iq reference from speed error

column15: Actual motor mechanical speed from speed observer
Speed reference command from application manager
Maximum Iq allowed — set by MtrMon based on protection state
System operation mode — triggers integrator reset on mode change
q-axis current reference to current controller — output of speed PI

column13: Initialize speed PI integrator to zero, ramp state, set IqRef=0.0, read init CalPrm
column16: Must complete before first TimingEvent fires

column13:
1. Ramp SpdRef by SpdRampRate (rate limiter)
2. Compute spdErr = spdRefRamped - SpdFbk
3. Apply deadzone SpdErrDz
4. PI: pTerm=Kp*spdErr; iState+=Ki*spdErr*0.001s
5. Anti-windup: clamp iState to ±AntiWindupLim
6. IqRef = clamp(pTerm+iState, ±IqMaxIn)
column16: ExclusiveArea protects iState if future OS task split needed

column13:
Reset PI integrator to 0 on transition to Init/Idle/Fault mode.
Set IqRef = 0.0. Prevents integrator windup on re-enable.

column15: Low: sluggish response. High: oscillation / instability

column14: I-gain of speed PI loop; applied per 1ms sample
column15: Low: steady-state error. High: integrator windup / oscillation

column14: Maximum absolute value of integrator state
column15: Too low: limits performance. Too high: windup risk during saturation

column14: Speed error below this is treated as zero (reduces jitter at steady-state)
column15: Too high: large steady-state speed error

column14: Maximum rate of change of speed reference (rate limiter)
column15: Too low: slow accel. Too high: mechanical stress / current spikes
column16: Applies to both accel and decel

column8: PI integrator state (accumulated integral term in A)
column13: ExclusiveArea required if runnables placed in different OS tasks

column8: Rate-limited speed reference after ramp processing (rpm)
Protects SpdCtrlIntgState and SpdRefRamped against concurrent access
